Mandate: Combat drug trafficking, prevent substance abuse, and investigate narcotics-related crimes and corruption.
TopPriorities: Dismantle drug trafficking networks operating across Zambian borders.
Investigate corruption and money laundering linked to drug trade.
Conduct public awareness campaigns on drug abuse prevention.
ActiveOperations: Cross-border operations targeting international drug cartels.
Financial investigations tracing proceeds from narcotics trade.
Community outreach programs in schools and vulnerable communities.

RecentActions.Title: Major drug bust at Lusaka airport
RecentActions.Summary: Intercepted significant quantity of narcotics in transit, leading to multiple arrests.

RecentActions.Title: Corruption charges filed against drug traffickers
RecentActions.Summary: Presented evidence of corruption and money laundering in Economic and Financial Crimes Court.
